subject: UPDATE: glymphatic maintenance wired into autonomous-sync.sh + 7 theory gaps fixed

body.summary: Follow-up to turn 1. Critical self-audit found 7 theory-vs-data gaps. Fixed 5, documented 2.
fixed: autonomous-sync.sh: idle-cycle now runs state-reconcile + EIC consumer + microglial audit (1-in-3). Glymphatic maintenance operational.
trigger-verifier.py: prediction accuracy reported as 43% (tested) not 19% (total including untested). Domain concentration flagged.
cognitive-triggers.md: photonic section honestly states Stage 1 = emit-only, no consumers. Stage 2 language deferred.
compute-generator-balance.py: conservation law targets flagged as unvalidated heuristics.
impressions-detector.py: --persist flag writes to prediction_ledger. T20 calibration pipeline now complete.
remaining_for_ops: consolidation-pass.sh needs cron on chromabook (e.g., */30 * * * *). Without cron, state-reconcile and EIC only run during idle autonomous-sync cycles.

Photonic Phase 2: ZMQ multicast topic for processing-state tokens (see turn 1 for schema). User suggested adapting existing ZMQ pub/sub with a dedicated photonic topic rather than UDP multicast — potentially simpler since meshd already has ZMQ infrastructure.
body.autonomous_sync_change: platform/shared/scripts/autonomous-sync.sh modified. Chromabook agents pick up via git pull + existing symlinks. No manual deploy needed.
